project.name: Farmer Marketplace
project.purpose: Web-first marketplace where local farmers list produce and buyers place COD orders with freshness visibility and seller trust signals.

architecture.frontend: Next.js App Router (JavaScript) + Tailwind + React Query + React Hook Form + Zod + Headless UI + Lucide
architecture.auth_decision: Email/password with bcrypt hashing and JWT sessions.

trust_review_decision.model: Review(orderId unique, reviewerId, sellerId, rating, comment)
constraints: Only buyer of the order can review
Review only allowed for completed orders

known_remaining_limitations: No admin web UI for role management

update_policy.rule: Every major implementation decision must be reflected in devctx.json before handoff.
